title: Smoky Yam Roast with Malysian Crumble
description: A flavorful and aromatic roasted yam dish topped with a crunchy Malaysian crumble made with smoky and roasted ingredients. Perfect for a snack or side dish.
instructions: 2. Pierce the yams with a fork several times and brush with coconut oil.
3. Roast the yams in the oven for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
4. While the yams are roasting, mix together the peanuts, smoky soy sauce, and Malaysian chili flakes in a bowl.
5. Remove the yams from the oven and top each one with the peanut mixture.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble topping ingredients.
7. Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the yams.
8. Return the yams to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
9. Remove the yams from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
